---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for KAYAD
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
owner: @product-lead
team: product
last-reviewed: 2026-06-23
review-frequency: quarterly
status: active
tags: [templates, issues]
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added to KAYAD.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What pain point does it address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see in detail. Include:

- How the feature should work
- User interface changes (if any)
- API changes (if any)
- Database changes (if any)

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request.

## Priority

- [ ] Critical - Must have for production
- [ ] High - Important for user experience
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Future consideration

## Implementation Effort

- [ ] Small (1-2 hours)
- [ ] Medium (1-2 days)
- [ ] Large (1-2 weeks)
- [ ] Extra Large (1+ months)
